item is recognized as serving a specific therapeutic purpose in the physician or allowed

Limited amounts of medical supplies may be left in the home between visits where 
repeated applications are required and rendered by the patient or other caregivers. These 
items must be part of the plan of care in which the home health staff is actively involved.
